items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-76 eastbound between Exit 346A: SOUTH STREET and Exit 346B: GREYS FERRY AVE/UNIVERSITY AVE. There is a lane restriction.
items.formatted: I-76 (Philadelphia County) | Multi vehicle crash on I-76 eastbound between Exit 346A: SOUTH STREET and Exit 346B: GREYS FERRY AVE/UNIVERSITY AVE. Estimated Reopen: 4/3/26 - 08:00
